update.clogs:
Base Version: 435.0.0.37.76

Major Update

Added: Image to Text (OCR) — Extracts text from any images instantly with highest accuracy. (Premium)

Added: DND Mode (Reels) — DND Mode automatically turns on when you start watching Reels and turns off when you leave. Enjoy your Reels without calls, notifications, or other distractions. (Premium)

Added: Add Custom Story Fonts — You can now add unlimited custom story fonts.

Added: Separate 'Mark as Seen' option for stories — You can now manually mark specific stories as seen, when Ghost Mode is enabled.

Added: Voice Note Downloader — You can now download voice notes directly from DMs.

Added: Watch History. (Post, Story, Reel, Profile)

Added: App Language Support (English, Arabic, Hindi, Turkish, Portuguese (Brazil), Indonesian, Russian, Spanish).

Added: Detailed Profile Stats — Shows exact follower and following numbers and lets you know whether an account is Public or Private.

Added: Download Cover Photo.

Added: Disable Chat List Options — Hides long-press options from the chat list (Hide Filter Notification, Hide Chats, Mark as Seen, etc).

Added: Option to Download Update from Telegram and Official Website, instead of just Telegram.

Fixed: Login Issues (Incorrect password, The password that you've entered is incorrect. Please try again.)

Fixed: Show Follow Indicator in User Profiles, Now works accurately.

Fixed: Multiple Direct icons from top action bar and bottom navigation tabs.

Fixed: Carousel Downloader (Slides) — You can download the exact photo or video you want from a carousel instead of always getting the first item.

Fixed: Enhance Photo / Story Upload Quality.

Fixed: Disable Reel Scrolling.

Fixed: Ghost Mode was not working in menu toggle.

Fixed: Export Developer Configs bugs.

Fixed: Download Failed issues in some devices.

Fixed: Minor UI Glitches in InstaPrime Settings.

Fixed: Storage permission is no longer requested at startup — storage permission is requested only when you use a feature that needs it.

Fixed: Hidden Mention UI glitches.

Fixed: Random Crashes.

Fixed: Minor heating issues.

Removed: The 'Long Press to access InstaPrime Settings' tooltip message from Home screen.

Free: Show Follow Indicator in User Profiles (Mutual, Following, Follower).
